description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steep, dark brown gable roof featuring two small dormer windows and a prominent stone chimney emitting smoke. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, with a mix of lighter and darker wood tones, and the base is surrounded by lush green shrubbery. The front facade includes a double wooden door and three rectangular windows, while the side view reveals the full height of the stone chimney and additional windows. The rear of the cabin is simpler, with a single dormer window and a large, uninterrupted roof slope. The cabin sits on a low stone foundation, and the landscaping is neatly bordered. The overall design suggests a cozy, traditional residential structure suitable for suburban or semi-rural neighborhoods.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, stone chimney, and lush shrubbery, featuring multiple windows and a double front door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double wooden door, three rectangular windows, and lush shrubbery along the base.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the tall stone chimney, with two windows and visible wooden siding.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large, uninterrupted roof slope, a single dormer window, and extensive shrubbery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single dormer window, a large roof section, and dense greenery at the base.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with two dormers and a prominent stone chimney, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Five rectangular windows: three grouped on the front facade below the roof, two smaller dormer windows on the roof, all symmetrically arranged
attribute_door_placement: Double wooden door centered on the front facade beneath the roof overhang
